data.title: American Outdoor Brands Reports Strong Q2 Performance
data.description:
Don't Miss our Black Friday Offers:

  • Unlock your investing potential with TipRanks Premium - Now At 40% OFF!
  • Make smarter investments with weekly expert stock picks from the Smart Investor Newsletter

American Outdoor Brands ( (AOUT) ) has shared an announcement.

American Outdoor Brands reported a strong second-quarter performance, driven by an innovative strategy that enhanced distribution, brand awareness, and profitability. They achieved a 4% increase in net sales and a 43% growth in adjusted EBITDAS. Their innovation includes a steady pipeline of new products and distinctive merchandising solutions, aiming to expand their market presence. Their success is attributed to their ability to meet retailer demands with consistently high-quality, cross-category products, which has led to positive feedback and expanded partnerships.

data.title: Linmon Media Limited Appoints New Auditor
data.description:
Linmon Media Limited (HK:9857) has released an update.

Don't Miss our Black Friday Offers:

  • Unlock your investing potential with TipRanks Premium - Now At 40% OFF!
  • Make smarter investments with weekly expert stock picks from the Smart Investor Newsletter

Linmon Media Limited has announced a change in its auditor, replacing Ernst & Young with Moore CPA Limited due to disagreements over audit fees. The transition is not expected to significantly impact the company’s annual audit work for 2024. The company expressed gratitude to Ernst & Young and welcomed Moore CPA Limited on board.

For further insights into HK:9857 stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: EssilorLuxottica Partners with WHO to Enhance Global Eye Care
data.description:
EssilorLuxottica SA (FR:EL) has released an update.

Don't Miss our Black Friday Offers:

  • Unlock your investing potential with TipRanks Premium - Now At 40% OFF!
  • Make smarter investments with weekly expert stock picks from the Smart Investor Newsletter

EssilorLuxottica’s OneSight Foundation has partnered with the World Health Organization to advance the SPECS 2030 initiative, aiming to improve global access to eye care and correct visual defects. This collaboration seeks to make eye care accessible and affordable for millions, particularly in underserved areas, by sharing expertise and resources. The initiative underscores the importance of vision care for health, social, and economic development.

For further insights into FR:EL stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Rubicon Technologies Announces Board Changes and Strategic Moves
data.description:
Don't Miss our Black Friday Offers:

  • Unlock your investing potential with TipRanks Premium - Now At 40% OFF!
  • Make smarter investments with weekly expert stock picks from the Smart Investor Newsletter

Rubicon Technologies ( (RBTC) ) has issued an update.

In a series of significant changes, two board members, Paula Dobriansky and Paula Henderson, have resigned, with Jose Miguel Enrich and Michael Dulin appointed to the board. Enrich, a major shareholder, is linked to a $20 million stock purchase and a $68 million asset sale agreement involving the company’s technology business. The company has also updated its Series B Preferred Stock designations, indicating strategic financial maneuvers that could impact shareholders.

See more insights into RBTC stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: SoftOx Solutions Announces Shareholder Dividend Plan
data.description:
SoftOx Solutions AS (DE:6FV) has released an update.

Don't Miss our Black Friday Offers:

  • Unlock your investing potential with TipRanks Premium - Now At 40% OFF!
  • Make smarter investments with weekly expert stock picks from the Smart Investor Newsletter

SoftOx Solutions AS has announced a planned in-kind dividend distribution of shares from its subsidiary, SoftOx Wound & Skin Care, on a 1:1 basis. This means each company share will be entitled to one share of the subsidiary, with a valuation of NOK 0.00512 per share. This dividend is contingent upon approval at the upcoming shareholder meeting in December 2024.

data.title: Ondas Holdings Partners with Siemens for Rail Network Upgrade
data.description:
Don't Miss our Black Friday Offers:

  • Unlock your investing potential with TipRanks Premium - Now At 40% OFF!
  • Make smarter investments with weekly expert stock picks from the Smart Investor Newsletter

Ondas Holdings ( (ONDS) ) has issued an announcement.

Siemens Mobility and Ondas Networks are collaborating to enhance Chicago’s Metra rail network by upgrading its 900 MHz communications system with cutting-edge Airlink wireless technology. This upgrade aims to boost network capacity, security, and reliability, setting a precedent for future rail communication systems across North America, and promising improved connectivity and efficiency for commuters in the bustling urban environment of Chicago.

For an in-depth examination of ONDS stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
